case_title: MARTIN URREL VELIZ VS. IMELDA GARCIA PEREZ

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY VELIZ, MARTIN URREL GARCIA PEREZ, IMELDA
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER OF CONTINUANCE ON ORDER OF EXAMINATION. BENCH LETTER ISSUED.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2022 IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-01-2022 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF/ JUDGMENT CREDITOR MARTIN URREL VELIZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/ JUDGMENT DEBTOR IMELDA GARCIA PEREZ IS PRESENT WITH JOSE ADRIAN ARRONA, SON. DEFENDANT/ JUDGEMENT DEBTOR ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PATRICE BINAISA. PARTIES CONDUCTED THE EXAMINATION. POST EXAMINATION, PLAINTIFF/ JUDGMENT CREDITOR STATED HE WAS NOT ABLE TO OBTAIN VALUE INFORMATION OF THE VEHICLE. PLAINTIFF INFORMS THE COURT THAT DISABILITY STATUS IS PENDING BUT WILL PROVIDE UPDATE STATUS OF DISABILITY TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR AT THE NEXT HEARING. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO DEC-01-2022 FOR DEFENDANT/ JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO PROVIDE THE INFORMATION. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2022 IS CONTINUED TO JAN-05-2023 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR MARTIN URREL VELIZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR IMELDA GARCIA PEREZ IS NOT PRESENT. BENCH LETTER IS ISSUED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR AN INTERPRETER.
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE OF OEX -ON 8/4/22 (SERVICE FEE $40) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VELIZ, MARTIN URREL AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA PEREZ, IMELDA

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-05-2023 IS CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER TO JUN-08-2023 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR MARTIN URREL VELIZ INFORMS THE COURTROOM CLERK BY PHONE THAT PARTIES ARE WORKING ON A PAYMENT PLAN AND REQUESTING CONTINUANCE TO JUNE-08-2023 AT 11:00 AM. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY BOTH PARTIES.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,132.04 FILED BY VELIZ, MARTIN URREL AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA PEREZ, IMELDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARKS: RESPONDENT CAME TO THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE AT CITY HALL, ROOM 456 AND WAS SERVED THE DOCUMENTS SERVED NOV-12-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA PEREZ, IMELDA
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR CURING UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VELIZ, MARTIN URREL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA PEREZ, IMELDA $2,133.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,223.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION CONTINUED THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2022 - CONTINUED FOR CURING UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-26-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NOT REQUIRED TO REDO-SERVICE. ALL PARTIES MUST APPEAR TO BE HEARD. PLAINTIFF MARTIN URREL VELIZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2022 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO FEB-17-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARTIN URREL VELIZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IMELDA GARCIA PEREZ IS PRESENT AND REQUESTS A SPANISH INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-17-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-17-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF MARTIN URREL VELIZ IS PRESENT . DEFENDANT IS IMELDA GARCIA PEREZ PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PATRICE BINAISA #301593. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-17-2022 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-19-2022 IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-17-2022 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF/ JUDGMENT CREDITOR MARTIN URREL VELIZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/ JUDGMENT DEBTOR IMELDA GARCIA PEREZ IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY NON-COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER JOSE ADRIAN ARRONA WHO WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETERS OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK. PARTIES CONDUCTED THE EXAMINATION IN THE COURT HALLWAY. POST EXAMINATION, PLAINTIFF/ JUDGMENT CREDITOR WAS NOT ABLE TO OBTAIN ENOUGH INFORMATION ON SC-133 FOR #8 - BANK ACCOUNT NUMBER AND 	 - ON VEHCILE LICNESE AND VIN NUMBER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO OCT-17-2022 FOR DEFENDANT/ JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO PROVIDE INFORMATION ON SC-133 #8 - BANK ACCOUNT NUMBER AND 	 - ON VEHCILE LICNESE AND VIN NUMBER. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA PEREZ, IMELDA HEARING SET FOR SEP-19-2022 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES. DISMISSAL FILED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MANI SHEIK; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
